ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-16-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-31-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Jan-31-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Dec-13-2022 Continued To Jan-31-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gretchen Barber, via Zoom, for Kathleen Miller, Executor.

Counsel reports of a pending Franchise Tax Board (FTB) issue which the court confirms is not mentioned in the instant petition. Counsel offers advocacy for the court to grant a preliminary distribution which she advises is only approximately ten percent of the estate's current value. After additional discussion, the court advises that it cannot make a preliminary distribution at this time and invites counsel to submit additional information in support of the requested preliminary distribution.

The matter is continued to Jan-31-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
Off Calendar Nov-15-2022 Continued To Dec-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-13-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-14-2022 Continued To Jul-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-16-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. Notice has been provided and there are no objections. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated September 17, 2018 is admitted to probate. Kathleen Miller is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 14, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed prior to the hearing, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-18-2020 Continued To Dec-16-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
